---
title: People
anchor-sections: false
format: 
  html:
    css: people.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="container mt-3">
  <div class="row row-cols-1 row-cols-md-2 row-cols-lg-3 g-4">
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card people-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mb-2'>
                    <div class='p-2 rounded-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0' style="width: 50px; height: 50px; background-color: #F1F9F5; color: var(--osc-accent)">
                        <i class='bi bi-briefcase fs-4' aria-hidden="true"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">Management</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Responsible for OSC's coordination, organization, and strategy.</p>
                <a href="management.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about Management">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card people-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mb-2'>
                    <div class='p-2 rounded-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0' style="width: 50px; height: 50px; background-color: #F1F9F5; color: var(--osc-accent)">
                        <i class='bi bi-people fs-4' aria-hidden="true"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">Staff</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">The team supporting OSC's day-to-day tasks.</p>
                <a href="staff.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about Staff">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card people-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mb-2'>
                    <div class='p-2 rounded-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0' style="width: 50px; height: 50px; background-color: #F1F9F5; color: var(--osc-accent)">
                        <i class='bi bi-mortarboard fs-4' aria-hidden="true"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">Scientific Board</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Interdisciplinary board guiding the OSC's scientific direction.</p>
                <a href="scientific-board.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about Scientific Board">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card people-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mb-2'>
                    <div class='p-2 rounded-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0' style="width: 50px; height: 50px; background-color: #F1F9F5; color: var(--osc-accent)">
                    <i class='bi bi-patch-question fs-4' aria-hidden="true"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">Advisors</h5>
                </div>
            <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Internal and external experts informing OSC's decisions.</p>
            <a href="advisors.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about Advisors">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card people-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mb-2'>
                    <div class='p-2 rounded-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0' style="width: 50px; height: 50px; background-color: #F1F9F5; color: var(--osc-accent)">
                        <i class='bi bi-person-badge fs-4' aria-hidden="true"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">Members</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Active contributors shaping OSC community.</p>
                <a href="members.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about Members">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
    <div class="col">
        <div class="card people-card h-100 shadow-sm rounded">
            <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column">
                <div class='d-flex flex-row flex-wrap align-items-center gap-2 mb-2'>
                    <div class='p-2 rounded-2 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center flex-shrink-0' style="width: 50px; height: 50px; background-color: #F1F9F5; color: var(--osc-accent)">
                        <i class='bi bi-award fs-4' aria-hidden="true"></i>
                    </div>
                    <h5 class="card-title mb-0" style="color: var(--osc-accent);">Fellows</h5>
                </div>
                <p class="card-text flex-grow-1">Early career researchers co-leading open research initiatives.</p>
                <a href="fellows.qmd" class="btn btn-primary mt-auto align-self-start" aria-label="Learn more about Fellows">Learn More</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

```
